So the easiest thing to do if your client doesn't have schema is if you're using Shopify, just install a plugin such as this one schema app total markup. It is $15 to $25 per month. Before you install this plugin, it's really important that you check the speed load time of the website and then after you install it, also check the load speed of the website to see what impact it has had because sometimes some clients have so many plugins that just even adding one more plugin messes everything up, the whole thing itself and implodes. So it's really important to track that. So install that and really all you have to do is install it and it does all the work itself. So that's the easiest thing.
